instance SysMLTooling : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model‑Based Systems Engineering artifact used to model functional and logical architecture, including Inter‑Block Diagrams and state machines (SysML v1.7)."

]

    base:desc "Service providing creation and editing of SysML models."

    base:desc "Insight into the SysML model completeness and consistency."
]

]

]

]

]
